headlines.title: April inflation rate surges to 3.8% amid uncertainty in the Middle East
headlines.description: Inflation rose to 3.8% year over year in April and 0.6% month over month as the war in Iran continues to affect the economy. NBC News' Christine Romans and editor-in-chief at Investopedia Caleb Silver report on the economic situation amid uncertainty in the Middle East.

headlines.title: Hegseth and Caine testify at Senate hearing amid Iran war
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as Defense Secretary Hegseth and Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Gen. Caine testify at a Senate Appropriations Committee hearing on the Department of Defense's budget request amid the Iran war and uncertainty around a possible peace deal as the cost of the conflict mounts.

headlines.title: Ship operators involved in Baltimore bridge collapse charged with misconduct and obstruction
headlines.description: The Justice Department brought 18 charges against the operators and a manager relating to a 2024 collision with the Francis Scott Key Bridge that killed six people.

headlines.title: Londoners pessimistic about Prime Minister Starmer's future
headlines.description: Londoners were pessimistic over Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s future after his Labour Party suffered heavy losses in local elections across the U.K.

headlines.title: Tuesday’s primaries to set up key fall matchups in Nebraska
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary elections in Nebraska will set the stage for November in a battleground House district, as well as a potentially competitive Senate contest, as Democrats try to win control of Congress.

headlines.title: Widely used educational software that many parents say makes kids ‘miserable’ faces backlash
headlines.description: A growing number of families and educators say they’re fed up with i-Ready’s personalized math and reading lessons, which feature repetitive cartoons and slow voice-overs.

headlines.title: Inside American passengers’ journey home from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
headlines.description: The 18 Americans evacuated from the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship arrived at medical facilities in Omaha and Atlanta. One passenger who tested mildly positive and another showing symptoms were placed in isolation. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

headlines.title: Why Anna Leigh Waters is already considered the GOAT of pickleball
headlines.description: Meet Anna Leigh Waters, only 19 years old and already considered the GOAT of pickleball. We caught up with her at the PPA Finals in California to find out more.

headlines.title: Late-night hosts reunite with Colbert before final show
headlines.description: Late-night hosts reunite with Colbert before final show

headlines.title: Cruise ship passenger speaks to TODAY from quarantine
headlines.description: Cruise ship passenger speaks to TODAY from quarantine

headlines.title: U.K. Prime Minister Starmer resists calls to step down
headlines.description: U.K. Prime Minister Starmer resists calls to step down
